assertions.assertion: Calls AddJwtBearer with Authority set to 'https://identity.example.com'
assertions.rationale: Authority is set to 'https://identity.example.com' in the AddJwtBearer options.
Audience is set to 'api1' in the AddJwtBearer options.

assertions.assertion: Sets TokenValidationParameters.ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' to prevent JWT confusion attacks
assertions.rationale: ValidTypes = ["at+jwt"] is set with explanation about JWT confusion attack prevention.

assertions.assertion: Includes UseAuthentication() before UseAuthorization() in the middleware pipeline
assertions.rationale: UseAuthentication() is called before UseAuthorization() with a comment explaining the ordering.
Package is added via dotnet add and shown in the .csproj file.
